record.title: 游戏C++服务端
responsibilities: 负责游戏服务器的逻辑设计与实现
配合策划完成游戏服务端功能模块的开发
requirements: 计算机、软件相关专业毕业，本科或以上学历
基本功扎实，熟悉C++/Lua，熟悉Linux和常用数据库，有完整游戏项目经验者优先
有很强的逻辑思维能力，解决技术难点的能力
record.work_location: 广州天河区龙口东路129号龙泽商业大厦17楼

failures.message: Detail page content was visible, but a Tencent slider verification iframe was also present on page. Extraction succeeded from visible content without interacting with the captcha.

note: Second Playwright-first detail-page extraction sample succeeded on Shixiseng.
